title: LiveCards Node Schema
description: Schema for LiveCards nodes. All nodes share one flat shape: id + state required; requires/provides/sources/compute/view optional. computed_values is runtime-only (never in JSON).

bind_ref.description: A path into the node's runtime namespace: state.*, requires.*, or computed_values.*

bind_or_literal.description: A literal value or a bind reference object

provides_binding.description: Explicit binding: publish a named token downstream from a resolved path

src.description: Path to read value from (state.*, requires.*, computed_values.*)

compute_step.description: A single ordered compute step: reads state.*/requires.*/computed_values.*, writes to computed_values[bindTo]

bindTo.description: Key in computed_values to write result

expr.description: JSONata expression evaluated against { state, requires, sources, computed_values }

source_entry.description: One source entry. The engine only cares about 'bindTo' (compute namespace key) and 'outputFile' (delivery signal). Every other property is yours — add whatever your task-executor needs: kind, url, headers, mailbox, channel, model, query, etc. The full object is passed verbatim as the --in JSON to the executor.

bindTo.description: Key under sources.* available in compute expressions

outputFile.description: Board-relative path the executor writes its JSON result to. Presence of this file signals delivery.

optional.description: When true this source does not gate task completion — the card re-evaluates when outputFile arrives later.

timeout.description: Executor/script timeout in ms. Default: 120 000 (2 min).

script.description: Legacy direct-run: shell command executed when no .task-executor is registered. stdout is captured as the result.

id.description: Optional element ID for targeted updates

visible.description: state path — element shown only if truthy

bind.description: state path to read data from

writeTo.description: state path for user input (form, filter, todo, notes)

upload.description: file-upload: show drop zone (false = read-only file list)

title: LiveCard Node
description: Unified node: id + state required. requires/provides/sources/compute/view all optional. No type discriminator — nodes with view render as cards; nodes without view and with sources render as source pills in canvas mode.

requires.description: IDs of upstream nodes this node depends on

provides.description: Explicit bindings publishing named tokens downstream. Each item: { bindTo, src } where src is a state.*/requires.*/computed_values.* path.

sources.description: Source entries. Each entry is passed verbatim to the board's .task-executor (registered via init --task-executor) as the --in JSON. The executor fetches/generates data and writes JSON to --out. If no executor is registered, the built-in executor runs the entry's 'cli' command directly. Non-optional sources must all deliver before task-completed fires. optional: true sources don't gate completion.

compute.description: Ordered compute steps. Each reads state.*/requires.*/sources.*/computed_values.* and writes to ephemeral computed_values[bindTo]. computed_values is never persisted.
